flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lake Region State College rose 38% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.5k → $10.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lake Region State College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $5.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lake Region State College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $5.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lake Region State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).
